title: Molecules that bind to mutant calreticulin and uses thereof
abstract: The present disclosure relates to antibodies, and antigen-binding fragments thereof, that bind to mutant calreticulin. The present disclosure also relates to bispecific antibodies, and bispecific antigen-binding fragments thereof, that bind to mutant calreticulin and cluster of differentiation 3. Also provided are cells expressing the antibodies, polynucleotides and vectors expressing all of some of the antibodies, pharmaceutical compositions comprising the antibodies, and methods of inhibiting the growth or proliferation, or treating, myeloproliferative neoplasm.
